description: Complete merged mapping pack for Woll2Woll InfoPower VCL controls. Combines the original base pack with supplemental entries covering label, image, data-aware image, status bar, and calendar.

rules.notes: Visual text edit can map, but InfoPower masks, validation, and DB binding require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify DataSource/DataField conversion and any PictureMask behavior.
Rich text data-aware editing requires manual document/editor migration.

rules.notes: Memo UI can map to TMemo, but DB binding and rich memo options require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify LiveBindings and memo field behavior.

rules.notes: Combo UI can map, but DB values, mapped lists, and lookup behavior require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify item/value mapping and LiveBindings.

rules.notes: Checkbox UI can map. Database checked/unchecked values require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify DB value mapping.

rules.notes: Date picker UI can map. Time/null formatting and DB binding require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify date/time field behavior.
Lookup combo table/key/display/filter behavior is too application-specific for automatic conversion.
Lookup dialog behavior requires explicit FMX UI and data-binding redesign.
InfoPower DBGrid has rich columns, embedded controls, lookup editors, filtering, and searching that need a grid-specific migration plan.
Record view layout is application-specific and should be redesigned manually.
Navigator commands should be reviewed with the target data-binding approach.
Incremental dataset search behavior needs manual data-layer review.
Visual filtering dialog and SQL/filter generation require manual migration.
Locate/search dialogs require manual migration.
Search dialog behavior requires manual migration.

rules.notes: Basic label text maps to FMX TLabel. InfoPower HTML text rendering and styling require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify that any HTML-formatted caption content is reviewed and replaced with plain text or an FMX HTML-capable label.

rules.notes: Image display maps to FMX TImage. InfoPower DB binding, stretch options, and visual effects require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify image resource loading and any DataSource/DataField wiring if data-aware.

rules.notes: Data-aware image maps to FMX TImage for display. DataSource, DataField, and blob field LiveBindings require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify LiveBindings setup for blob/image fields and review image loading from dataset.
InfoPower status bar panels and owner-drawn panes require manual FMX layout redesign using TLayout and TLabel combinations at the bottom of the form.

rules.notes: Calendar date selection maps conceptually to FMX TCalendar. InfoPower multi-select, event display, and formatting require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify date selection events and any custom day rendering or highlighting behavior.
